change_boundary.what_changed: Completed UCR attestation syscall (ucr_register), contract specs (UCR_ATTESTATION_SPEC, TRUST_ROOT_SPEC, COG_ACT_COMMIT_SPEC), tests, and package exports.
change_boundary.why_changed: User spec for UCR governed stack attestation registration and formal contract alignment.
assumptions: v0.1 placeholder signature (sha3-256 over canonical fields) acceptable until asymmetric issuer lands.
ucr_handle as UUID acceptable per spec u64 alternative.
change_boundary.reversal: Remove attestation module exports, contract specs, tests, and this manifest.

uncertainty.resolution_path: If asymmetric attestation issuer or ucr_handle wire format is disputed, hold merge and escalate to Meta Architect review.
